metadata.title: True round-trip GitHub sync: search provider, validate diagnostics, safe-by-default export, fix activation
metadata.description:
Deepen pm-github toward a true GitHub<->pm round-trip and fix a shipped activation-breaking bug.

CRITICAL BUG FOUND: published 2026.6.2 manifest capabilities omit 'preflight' but index.ts calls api.registerPreflight -> 'extension_activate_failed' -> the ENTIRE extension fails to activate (no import/export/sync/commands work). Must add 'preflight' to manifest.

Enhancements:
1. github validate diagnostics command: gh/token availability, repo accessibility, --json.
2. search provider (search capability): registers a 'github' provider that queries GitHub issues for --repo and maps matches back to local imported pm items (provider hits MUST reference local item ids; remote-only ids are dropped by runtime). Add 'search' to manifest ONLY if verified to activate + return hits.
3. Export safety: make export DEFAULT to dry-run (print would-create/update payloads); real writes only with --apply/--no-dry-run AND --repo; upsert existing GitHub issues by provenance.

Constraints: CommandError w/ numeric exitCode; --json via ctx.global.json (no own stdout in json mode); type-only SDK imports; backward compatible; real writes opt-in only.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Duplicate of pm-github-9dqy (a failed JSON-parse on the create response masked a successful create, so the feature was created twice). 9dqy is the canonical feature carrying all child tasks/decisions.

metadata.title: Adopt full SDK capability surface: native importer/exporter, schema fields, afterCommand hook, richer import flags
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Implemented + verified (build/tsc/test/functional green); backward compatible.

metadata.title: Production-harden gh-issues import
metadata.description: Make the GitHub issue importer reliable for real-world use: authenticated requests, full pagination, correct dry-run, and accurate exit codes.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: All four hardening fixes shipped, tested (6 unit tests), and verified against a live repo import.

metadata.title: Domain-max SDK enhancement: idempotent import, sync, preflight, renderer
metadata.description:
Drastically enhance pm-github toward domain-appropriate max of the pm-cli SDK surface.

Value: turn the importer from a one-shot duplicating fetch into a real GitHub<->pm sync tool, and surface the remaining SDK capabilities that genuinely fit the GitHub-issues domain.

Outcome / acceptance criteria:
- Re-import is IDEMPOTENT: existing pm items matched by github_number provenance are UPDATEd (via pm update <id>), not duplicated. The schema fields github_url/github_number/github_state are actually populated (not just description text).
- --with-comments flag appends issue comments to the item body.
- New 'pm github sync' command pushes pm status changes back to GitHub (close/reopen linked issue) guarded by token + --repo + --dry-run preview.
- preflight capability validates token/gh auth + repo reachability before mutating github commands, with clear failure_hints.
- renderers capability registers a 'github' output format rendering pm items as GitHub-issue markdown.
- afterCommand hook made genuinely useful (still no surprise network calls by default).
- Rate-limit/backoff handling (Retry-After / X-RateLimit-Reset), timeouts retained.
- manifest capabilities updated to exactly match: commands, importers, schema, hooks, preflight, renderers.

Capabilities before: commands, importers, schema, hooks (4/9).
Capabilities after target: commands, importers, schema, hooks, preflight, renderers (6/9). search intentionally skipped (no genuinely useful remote search provider distinct from import filters).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Shipped in 2026.6.2 (importer/exporter/sync/hook/schema). Superseded by round-trip feature; note: preflight intended but manifest shipped WITHOUT preflight capability -> activation failure, fixed under new feature.

metadata.title: --dry-run silently wrote items instead of previewing
metadata.description: Flag registered as --dry-run but read as ctx.options['dry-run']; runtime normalizes to camelCase 'dryRun', so dry-run was always false and the importer created real items in 'preview' mode. Fixed by reading both key forms via optionEnabled().
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed and verified end-to-end (build+tests+live import).

metadata.title: Thrown errors lacked exitCode → runtime re-invoked handler (double fetch)
metadata.description: Command threw plain Error without a numeric exitCode. pm's runCommandHandler only treats a thrown error as cleanly handled when it carries exitCode; a plain Error falls through the unhandled path and RE-INVOKES the handler a second time (a second GitHub fetch on failure) and exits with a generic code. Fixed via a dependency-free CommandError mirroring the SDK EXIT_CODE contract (USAGE=2, NOT_FOUND=3, GENERIC=1); cannot import PmCliError since the SDK is not resolvable from the installed extension dir at runtime.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed: CommandError carries exitCode (USAGE/NOT_FOUND/GENERIC). Verified end-to-end — bad-arg exits 2, 404 exits 3, single handler invocation (no double fetch); 6 unit tests pass incl. new exitCode assertion.

metadata.title: Importer was unauthenticated (60 req/hr, no private repos)
metadata.description: fetchJSON sent no Authorization header. Added resolveGitHubToken() honoring GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN with gh-CLI fallback (60 -> 5000 req/hr, private repos work).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed and verified end-to-end (build+tests+live import).

metadata.title: Failed imports exited 0 (broke automation)
metadata.description: Handler returned { error } which runtime treats as success (exit 0). Switched to throwing for non-zero exit; also fail when every create fails.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed and verified end-to-end (build+tests+live import).

metadata.title: Issue list truncated at one page (no pagination)
metadata.description: per_page=100 with no pagination silently dropped issues beyond page 1. Added RFC-5988 Link-header following via parseNextLink().
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed and verified end-to-end (build+tests+live import).

metadata.title: Production-readiness audit 2026-05-28
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Production-readiness audit completed in prior sweeps (rate-limit/backoff, pagination, exit codes all landed). Closing stale in_progress.

metadata.title: Tests + functional verification against real public repo (idempotent re-import)
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Shipped in prior releases (2026.5.29-2026.6.2): idempotent import, --with-comments, backoff, sync. Note: renderer/preflight tasks (vvov/jget) intended but renderer never coded + preflight missing from manifest.

metadata.title: Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
metadata.description: Replace the npm publish step in .github/workflows/release.yml with a resilient version that (1) skips if the version is already published, (2) retries up to 3 times with 30s sleep, and (3) falls back to publishing without --provenance after persistent registry 404s. Permanent fix for the 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage that left all 19 packages tagged in git but unpublished on npm.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Merged via PR #3

metadata.title: github search provider (search capability)
metadata.description: registerSearchProvider({name:'github',query}) guarded by typeof check. Queries GitHub issues for --repo (or settings) and maps upstream matches to LOCAL imported pm items via provenance tag (runtime drops hits whose id is not a local doc). Verify activation + returns hits before adding 'search' to manifest.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.actual_result: 2 real hits mapped to local items
metadata.close_reason: Implemented 'github' search provider (search capability). Verified: with search.provider=github + PM_GITHUB_REPO, 'pm search dashes --semantic' returned 2 hits (pm-c3dt #31, pm-w70p #35) mapped from real GitHub search results to local imported items, GH-relevance-ordered (1.0>0.5), matched_fields=github:repo#N. Capability ADDED to manifest only after verifying activation (activation_failed=0) + real results. Note: provider requires settings.search.provider='github' to select it (SDK gating).

metadata.title: Unit tests + functional verification + README + decisions
metadata.description: node --test unit tests for new pure fns (buildSearchQuery/matcher, validate result builder, export plan builder). Functional: import w/ filters, upsert re-import, search, export --dry-run, validate against real public repo. Update README. Record decisions.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Added 8 unit tests (buildExportPlan create/update, exportWillApply precedence, buildSearchUrl, mapSearchHits, resolveSearchRepo, search-provider + validate registration) — 16/16 pass. Functional vs real public repo sindresorhus/slugify: activation ok:1/warnings:[]; import --state all=34; re-import=0 new/34 updated/0 dupes; --labels bug=1 (matches gh); search 'dashes' --semantic=2 hits mapped to local items; export dry-run-default would_update:34 + --json plan; validate ok/accessible + exit 3 on 404. README updated.

metadata.title: Idempotent import: match by github_number, update not duplicate; populate schema fields
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Shipped in prior releases (2026.5.29-2026.6.2): idempotent import, --with-comments, backoff, sync. Note: renderer/preflight tasks (vvov/jget) intended but renderer never coded + preflight missing from manifest.

metadata.title: Export: dry-run default + upsert existing issues by provenance
metadata.description: Change exporter so it DEFAULTS to dry-run (print would-create/update). Real writes only with --apply/--no-dry-run AND --repo. Upsert: if a pm item's provenance tag points at an existing issue in target repo, PATCH it instead of creating a duplicate.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.actual_result: dry-run default verified, writes opt-in only
metadata.close_reason: Export now SAFE BY DEFAULT (dry-run). Verified: 'pm github export --repo X' prints would-create/update plan + writes NOTHING (dry_run:true); --json returns plan object (no stdout corruption); items imported from the target repo correctly show would_update:34 (upsert via provenance), a different repo shows would_create:34; '--apply' without --repo errors safely (no writes); '--apply' requires token+repo. Real GitHub writes NOT performed (constraint). Legacy --push kept as --apply alias. Also fixed upsert reader bug (pm list -> list-all so closed items aren't duplicated).

metadata.title: preflight capability: validate token/gh auth + repo reachability before mutating github commands
metadata.author: codex
metadata.actual_result: manifest missing capability -> activation failed; fixed in new feature
metadata.close_reason: Preflight handler was coded but 'preflight' was OMITTED from manifest capabilities, so activation FAILS entirely. Re-tracked + fixed under new round-trip feature.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

metadata.title: FIX: add 'preflight' to manifest capabilities (activation-breaking bug)
metadata.description: Code calls api.registerPreflight but manifest capabilities lack 'preflight' -> extension_activate_failed in 2026.6.2. Add preflight. Verify via pm extension --doctor that activation succeeds.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Added 'preflight' to manifest capabilities. Verified: pm extension --doctor went from 'extension_activate_failed:project:pm-github' (whole extension dead) to activation_status_totals ok:1, warnings:[]. Import command now works.

metadata.title: github validate diagnostics command
metadata.description: New 'github validate' command: checks gh CLI presence, token resolvability, and repo accessibility (HEAD repo via API). Supports --repo and --json (read ctx.global.json; return object in json mode, no own stdout). CommandError w/ exitCode on hard failure.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Implemented 'github validate': checks gh CLI, token+source, repo accessibility. --json returns structured report (no stdout corruption); bad repo exits 3. Verified against octocat/Hello-World (HTTP 200, rate_limit_remaining shown) + nonexistent repo (exit 3).

metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: pm github sync: push pm status -> GitHub close/reopen, guarded by token+--repo+--dry-run
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Shipped in prior releases (2026.5.29-2026.6.2): idempotent import, --with-comments, backoff, sync. Note: renderer/preflight tasks (vvov/jget) intended but renderer never coded + preflight missing from manifest.

metadata.title: Export defaults to dry-run; real writes need --apply AND --repo
metadata.description: Safety: pm github export prints a would-create/would-update plan by default. Real POST/PATCH to GitHub only when --apply (or --no-dry-run) AND --repo <owner/repo> are BOTH present and a token resolves. Replaces the prior --push-only path (kept --push as alias of --apply for back-compat).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Decision recorded and implemented; no further action.

metadata.title: Provenance scheme: gh:owner/repo#N tag (lowercased), reused as-is
metadata.description: Keep existing idempotency key: a tag gh:owner/repo#N stored lowercased. Tags are case-folded by pm anyway; parseProvenanceTag normalizes. Search + export upsert reuse the SAME key so all three round-trip paths agree. No reliance on registerItemFields setters (#97).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Decision recorded and implemented; no further action.

metadata.title: Search provider maps remote matches to LOCAL items only
metadata.description: pm runtime drops provider hits whose id is not a local document (normalizeExtensionProviderHits). So the github provider queries GitHub for the repo, then returns hits ONLY for issues that are already imported locally (matched by provenance tag). Semantics: 'find my imported items whose upstream issue matches this query'. Provider runs only in semantic/hybrid mode. Add 'search' to manifest only after verifying it activates + returns hits.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Decision recorded and implemented; no further action.

metadata.title: True round-trip GitHub sync: search provider, validate diagnostics, safe-by-default export, fix activation
metadata.description: Deepen pm-github toward true round-trip + fix activation-breaking bug. CRITICAL: published 2026.6.2 manifest omits 'preflight' but code calls registerPreflight -> extension_activate_failed -> whole extension dead. Add validate command, github search provider (maps to local imported items), dry-run-default export upsert.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: All 5 tasks delivered + verified vs real public repo (sindresorhus/slugify): fixed activation-breaking manifest gap (preflight+search), added github validate, github search provider, dry-run-default export with provenance upsert, fixed pm-list-vs-list-all upsert dup bug. 16/16 tests pass; release:check green. Capabilities 4/9 -> 6/9 (commands,importers,schema,hooks,preflight,search).
